{{CargoRelic
|name=Earthworm Codex
|class_id=20452
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This codex is the culmination of earthworm's wisdom. In the ancient past, they ruled the underground by developing extraordinary technology and creating a magnificent civilization. However, all this came to a halt with the arrival of the dung beetles. This ancient codex became the only vestige of earthworm's existence...
|fame=28
|art=10
|fth=20
|civ=18
|tech=12
|ss1=Fungus Farm: +2%chance to produce<br>Wonder Fungi<br>With Earthworm Assistance, ATK +2%
|ss2=Fungus Farm: +4%chance to produce<br>Wonder Fungi<br>With Earthworm Assistance, ATK +4%
|ss3=Fungus Farm: +6%chance to produce<br>Wonder Fungi<br>With Earthworm Assistance, ATK +6%
|ss4=Fungus Farm: +6%chance to produce<br>Wonder Fungi<br>With Earthworm Assistance, ATK +6%
|ss7=Fungus Farm: +6%chance to produce<br>Wonder Fungi<br>With Earthworm Assistance, ATK +6%<br> (Awakened)
}}
